message.body: maybe you’ll be able to get the double d run soon
playing a game known as i wanna kill the kamilia 3 and doing "golden crystals"
need to do stage 2 in under 100 deaths
oh! does that include the boss?
i think i could maybe do stage 1 under 100 deaths with some practice, but i cannot imagine a universe where i do anything but that....yet
i just did it before this
i think i'll struggle with everything past stage 1
i assume the later stages give you more lives to work with at least
do the guest stages have golden crystals too? or just the main ones?
i didnt even know this game had golden crystals. i know there was a big update a yearish ago, wasnt too sure of the contents of the update though. i dont follow a lot of k3
yeah it game with the v2.0 update
never felt like trying it until now
well good luck, i have to get going!
damn you're just that good huh
i do forget those two screens exist when i think of stage
theyre my least favorite screens in the whole game
how can you not enjoy rng though?
ah it feels just like regular runs
kashio would be disappointed in me
man if i even make it to RZ itll be a miracle good lord
to be fair this isn't main game
its okay just get guy tower crystal this attempt and you win
hey no reason to not attempt it at least
oh got a 20 second delay at some point, neat
there's this, rz and guy tower
and i lost like 70 deaths to QUT LMAO
at least this drop isn't qut
it really wouldve been a miracle lol
tt do you know if golden crystals are saved in the savedata2 file?
cant easily practice RZ so i'll just hope that goes well enough
you got a hope the save?
so i hope that goes well too
that'll be fine, you had that
def seem like you'll be getting a few deaths here...
oh right i forgot about that
how does the secret area open
do you have to clear the game first lol

the cyber thing is supposed to be open
ok, walkoff is better for me and this is why i recomended
ah, you need to do something for this
but i remember it's blocked for some reason
full ver of the track Kreygasm
You need to beat ex m stage for it
no shot you need to do ex m stage first
oh that was just a meme okay wolskCola
nah didnt even try it lol
man no shot i get the stage 3 golden
guy tower and RZ will roll me
just deathless everything up to rz and surely you'll have a chance

that achievement timing was so dumb
@Naloas you can definitely do it with some practice
honestly the hardest part of stage 4 for me would be dotkid
the rest i think id be fine enough
in my top 3 worst sets of screens: QUT, black, dotkid
@Naloas i watched you go through extra pretty fast
i spent like 20 hours on justice ex alone lol
you did do EX RZ decently fast
glad i quit out without saving so i could do it again
and you prob struggled less with some saves in EX hades than i would
nah you'd do fine with the tips i had
no shot i'd have beat it that fast without help
like that platform save is infamous for a reason
then gafro is like "do this" and i beat it in 15 mins
platform as in like the 4th save?
yeah those 2 are the ones im scared of
that's understandable at least but also wow
asshole took 10 years to figure that one out
couldnt do anything to nerf the entire guy tower crystal
in an actual attempt i would

but the visuals destroy me way more than normal somehow
if i put this whole screen in jtool i could do it more easily lol

oh no, you accidentally hit r
do we just try to raw dog it
no RZ practice. bad guy tower practice
who left all these spikes here
they're not even sharp, it's just a bunch of triangles

yeah wtf that's messed up just insulting all those spikes
have you seen the sort of people with harvard degrees, that sounds more insulting
just get to rz then backup that save
lol another kill the guy mention when fangames were brought up wolsk

just cause we've spoken about the random ktg callouts before

starter, qut, justice, flower, hope the, rz, btg

Plugging in the steering wheel to control the screen tilt

although the lack of a 2nd message made me unsure
Mods, send this bot and their creator to the atom rotation chamber
was a slight improvement at least
yeah im never getting this golden lol
what do you mean? it's easy, 50 deaths for the first 8 games, then 150 for rz and guy tower
the unfortunate part is that 50 deaths for the first 8 sounds like the easy part of that statement lmao
yeah save 4 has been nerfed so much over the years
couldn't stick to his own vision
the cowardice truly is the most frustrating part
"yeah i've made everyone suffer, maybe i can nerf it now"
it's okay he didnt nerf guy tower crystal
no of course not, guy tower crystal is iconic
unlike RZ which no one knows
nerfing guy tower crystal is the same as raising the price on the costco hotdog
someone will kill you if you do it
just some chill s3 golden practice
how do you feel about 4 atm?
depends on how many deaths it is
Ah, so this is your alt channel, Wolsk?

noone would ever suspect me with an anime girl and a hat

ty i think it's going well sometimes

i figured barfy told you or something LOL
twitch recommended is pretty good ngl

why is save 1 like the hardest save lol

had to throw off my headphones
the diamond at the end of save 2 is rough
discord launching missiles at your location
I didn't know you still actively played K3, do you have 100% as a goal in mind?
yeah actively is the wrong word
i dont care about 100%. just kinda play it when i feel like it
considering wolsk reached final boss then never beat it
goal is to at least unlock and do extra eventually
They play k3 like I play my backlog
oh wait you're playing discord makers, fair enough
yes also I just came back from playing K3+
my opinions on nice looking needle may have influences like that lmao
i mean that platforming looks better than k3 ex to me still
leehe area is something special though
but yeah a lot of the extra bosses do not look fun to me
and ex m-stage looks like actual garbage
so my goal is "play what i feel like playing"
like maybe ex piano and colonel
i feel like colonel would be one of the last ones i'd beat
colonel looks fun if you use practice
but the pattern is just so dumb without it
yeah im so cooked for this golden
That little tunnel does seem to be twisting your nipples off yeah
that's why you keep 150 deaths for this save, easy
thats why you have to do it deathless
can't even start the attempt without it
I went to see if I have any alternative 4head emotes
i didn't even remember those going away
it really is just the lack of commitment that gets me lol
that honestly changes the fight in such a big way and i doubt he had any thoughts about it too
I can't believe kirby blew up both the sun and the moon and doomed the planet
there's no way he could code that
higher chance of lower number rolls i believe
or at least a lower chance of 9
we threw the pan out, cooking time is over
Not dying once after missing it that many times was crazy work
i like the jtool bar on the side
no that's the rest of the screen
this save is such a bane
well sure but that's the majority of the og buffs
like i'm still in 2 minds about "yeah i added a save but also frame perfect jump"
and that wasn't even an og
at least we got water 3 fixed
it worked correctly based on the code
lol when did you get that one
don't think i've seen it before
years ago but it's a bit emote
super low tier bit emote since i have it
and now i cant do it
you got the strat backwards, it was supposed to be deathless up to tower not deathless tower
Is tower the last segment of this set?
like 45 deaths to that save alone
quick, someone try to think of where the secrets might be in this game
ok i've thought of it, now what
it might be in the secret locations txt
good point, wolsk probably figured it out
you can double jump in the air
i think you move with arrow keys
can i double jump on the ground?
okay fr what was the button LMAO

yeah that wasn't clear at first lol
so if anyone has guesses where secrets might be
38 is the only one we have a lead on

one was just on top of a block near the top of the screen
i'll be honest i'm not confident in sunblas idea
because thered be no reason not to just make it a block
what's the idea? there's been some... creative ones already so i wouldn't put much past this game
just like possibly a trigger or something in the gap
is there sth near the floor number there
nah skull thats where a save would be in easy mod
i guess theres nothing going off the top of the screen too lol
can't believe my save blocker idea isn't being taken seriously...
is there sth if you go into that 16px between the spikeleft and killblock, in the top middle
the must suspicious things are the start of the save and the end of the save
it looks like u can make it there with a jump
i got far into the gap
generally skull when you find the secret it freezes you and you fall
so you gotta be able to land
doesn't mean the spot is impossible ofc, but still
yeah idk anything about this game im just spitballing lmao
yeah it's fair i said the same idea
no it's perfectly fine to spitball
do an invisible gate in the bottom right a bunch of times
to me id just think of like places you wouldnt think of reaching normally cuz those are satisfying ways to do a secret in sth like a needle/floor game, but this could be literally anything
press Q a gajillion times and do a backflip
yeah i was gonna try it nal
be sure to turn cam on so the backflip can be verified
have you gone to the right part of that exit on the top? like maybe theres a spike above the water and it's offscreen
Any chance for a triger on floor 28 that would change something on floor 29?
i won't lie i really hoped that' have an indicator of some sort
and no werumy i dont think so because many rooms are separate and reset on entry
it would be silly if a trigger in a different room influenced that one
even in fangames that have screens all connected like this, that doesn't tend to happen
the sus part of 40 is the cherries
do the cherry gap and land somewhere?
yeah they're obviously apples, very suspicious indeed
i don't even know which wall is good for a gap like ther
the problem is it's so hard to even have a chance at trying the align lol
have u done the little downwards plane water
like it could be something dumb like doing the align on both sides
i sure can't see anything else either
i havent skull because it seems way too unlikely
but you would look so cool...
no chance itd make me do that
could try the left gap cuz thats more reasonable
i wish it wasnt so hard to try things
that's why i live in my basement
